differential_diagnoses: Disseminated malignancy with non-bacterial thrombotic endocarditis
next_steps: Transesophageal echocardiography to visualize valvular vegetations
Comprehensive autoimmune panel including antiphospholipid antibodies (anticardiolipin, lupus anticoagulant, anti-beta-2 glycoprotein I)
Serum ANCA, anti-dsDNA, and C3/C4 levels
Serial blood cultures and specialized serologic/PCR testing for fastidious pathogens (Bartonella, Coxiella, Brucella)
CSF analysis including broad-range 16S rRNA gene sequencing and PCR for common neurological pathogens
Urgent biopsy of skin petechiae for histopathological evaluation and immunofluorescence
Chest and abdominal CT follow-up to assess the progression of pulmonary and splenic lesions
